steps.title: Factor to reveal the given expression
steps.content: We need to evaluate $42 + 6x$. Both terms share a common factor of 6: $$42 + 6x = 6 \cdot 7 + 6 \cdot x = 6(7 + x)$$

steps.title: Substitute the given equation
steps.content: We are given that $7 + x = 4$. Substituting into our factored expression: $$6(7 + x) = 6 \cdot 4 = 24$$
